prompt: Create an ultra-realistic close-up luxury editorial portrait of a beautiful woman wearing a simple black dress. Show her in a graceful side-profile pose with a gentle smile, one hand lifted delicately near her chin. She has short shoulder-length dark brown hair in a soft half-bun with curtain bangs, elegant round black eyeglasses, and exactly 2 visible small gold hoop earrings on the ear facing the camera. Use shallow depth of field with a softly blurred urban street background and warm natural bokeh lights. Crop tightly from the upper chest to above the head, emphasizing hair texture, neckline, hand, eyeglasses, and jewelry. Photorealistic DSLR fashion photography, 85mm lens, f/1.4 aperture, creamy background blur, natural skin tones, soft daylight, high-end magazine aesthetic. Include a centered square face-obscuring placeholder block in a warm brown skin-tone color covering the facial features, as if anonymized, while leaving the hair, ear, glasses edge, neck, hand, and clothing visible. No text, no watermark, no extra accessories.
